message:
feat(node): feature-gate extended-surfaces modules and restructure main.rs imports

Gates 9 connector submodules behind #[cfg(feature = "extended-surfaces")]
so they are excluded from the default build, reducing compilation time
and binary size for deployments that don't need them:
- fuzz_corpus, golden_vectors, interop_suite, n_version_oracle,
  offline_coverage, operator_intelligence, universal_verifier_sdk,
  vef_perf_budget, verifier_sdk

Also gates the top-level `api` module in lib.rs behind the same feature.

main.rs restructured to resolve the resulting import breakage:
- Inlines `mod api` directly in main.rs with concrete imports for
  fleet_quarantine handlers/types, middleware identity/trace types,
  and trust_card_routes queries/pagination
- Removes the now-gated `frankenengine_node::api::*` imports
- Re-exports connector, control_plane, and supply_chain at crate root
  so downstream tests continue to resolve
- Updates fleet_command_tests to use crate::api instead of lib re-export

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
